title: Active Multi-Stage Campaign — Threat Hunt 2026-05-26
description: Live monitoring of an active, ongoing intrusion campaign first detected 2026-03-16, still active as of today (2026-05-26 14:49 PT). 9 confirmed TTPs spanning endpoint persistence, lateral C2, credential harvesting, and external brute force.

options.query: index=threat_gen sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" | stats count by ComputerName | sort ComputerName | eval label=ComputerName, value=ComputerName | fields label, value

index=threat_gen ((sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" EventID=3 *cmd.exe*) OR (sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" WSPrint) OR ((sourcetype=stream:http OR sourcetype=stream:dns) (185.196.10.247 OR 185.196.10.38 OR 212.11.64.105 OR bloopencil.net OR xcit76.com OR xtibh.com OR slack-msgs.com))) | eval __ws=trim(replace("$tok_workstation|n$"," ","")) | where (len(__ws)<1 OR __ws="*" OR coalesce(Computer,ComputerName,host) IN (split(__ws,","))) | stats count

index=threat_gen sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" | spath | search (EventID=3 EventData.Image="*\\cmd.exe") OR WSPrint | eval __ws=trim(replace("$tok_workstation|n$"," ","")) | where (len(__ws)<1 OR __ws="*" OR Computer IN (split(__ws,","))) | stats dc(Computer) as workstations

index=threat_gen | rex "(?:Failed password for|Invalid user)\s+(?:invalid user\s+)?(?<linux_user>\S+)\s+from\s+(?<linux_src>\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)" | rex field=Message "Source Network Address:\s+(?<win_src_raw>[\d.:]+)" | eval win_src=replace(win_src_raw, "^::ffff:", "") | eval brute_src=coalesce(linux_src, win_src) | eval attacker_ip=if(cidrmatch("185.196.10.0/24", coalesce(src_ip, dest_ip)) OR coalesce(src_ip, dest_ip)="212.11.64.105", coalesce(src_ip, dest_ip), null()) | eval ext_ip=coalesce(attacker_ip, if(isnotnull(brute_src) AND brute_src!="-" AND NOT cidrmatch("10.0.0.0/8", brute_src) AND NOT cidrmatch("172.16.0.0/12", brute_src) AND NOT cidrmatch("192.168.0.0/16", brute_src), brute_src, null())) | where isnotnull(ext_ip) | stats dc(ext_ip) as total
index=threat_gen sourcetype=stream:dns ("slack-msgs.com" OR "bloopencil.net" OR "xcit76.com" OR "xtibh.com") | spath | stats count
(index=threat_gen sourcetype=linux_secure ("Failed password" OR "Invalid user")) OR (index=threat_gen sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4625) | stats count

index=threat_gen sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" "WSPrint" | spath | eval __ws=trim(replace("$tok_workstation|n$"," ","")) | where (len(__ws)<1 OR __ws="*" OR Computer IN (split(__ws,","))) | timechart span=1d count by Computer

ds_cmd_outbound_bar.name: cmd.exe outbound by host and user

options.query: index=threat_gen sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" | spath | search EventID=3 EventData.Image="*\\cmd.exe" | rename Computer as host, EventData.User as user_full | rex field=user_full "[^\\\\]+\\\\(?<user>.+)" | eval __ws=trim(replace("$tok_workstation|n$"," ","")) | where (len(__ws)<1 OR __ws="*" OR host IN (split(__ws,","))) | stats count by host, user | eval label=host." — ".user | sort -count | head 25

index=threat_gen (sourcetype=stream:http OR sourcetype=stream:dns) (185.196.10.247 OR 185.196.10.38 OR 212.11.64.105 OR "bloopencil.net" OR "xcit76.com" OR "xtibh.com" OR "slack-msgs.com") | stats count, latest(_time) as last_seen by src_ip, dest_ip, sourcetype, http_user_agent, uri_path | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M") | sort - last_seen
index=threat_gen sourcetype=stream:dns ("slack-msgs.com" OR "bloopencil.net" OR "xcit76.com" OR "xtibh.com") | spath | rename query{} as query | timechart span=1d count by query

(index=threat_gen sourcetype=linux_secure ("Failed password" OR "Invalid user")) OR (index=threat_gen sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4625) | rex "(?:Failed password for|Invalid user)\s+(?:invalid user\s+)?(?<linux_user>\S+)\s+from\s+(?<linux_src>\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)" | rex field=Message "Source Network Address:\s+(?<win_src_raw>[\d.:]+)" | eval win_src=replace(win_src_raw, "^::ffff:", "") | eval src_ip=coalesce(linux_src, win_src) | eval failed_user=coalesce(linux_user, user) | where isnotnull(src_ip) AND src_ip!="-" | stats count, dc(failed_user) as unique_users, values(failed_user) as users by src_ip, sourcetype | sort -count | head 30

index=threat_gen sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4624 | rex field=Message "Logon Type:\s+(?<logon_type>\d+)" | rex field=Message "Source Network Address:\s+(?<src_addr_raw>[\d.:]+)" | eval src_addr=replace(src_addr_raw, "^::ffff:", "") | search logon_type=10 | where NOT cidrmatch("10.0.0.0/8", src_addr) AND NOT cidrmatch("172.16.0.0/12", src_addr) AND src_addr!="-" | eval __ws=trim(replace("$tok_workstation|n$"," ","")) | where (len(__ws)<1 OR __ws="*" OR ComputerName IN (split(__ws,","))) | timechart span=1h count by ComputerName

options.markdown:
## Live campaign KPIs (24h)
Critical indicators across endpoint, network, and identity attack stages. **Campaign still active** — first seen 2026-03-16.

kpi_critical.title: Critical events (24h)
kpi_critical.description: cmd.exe outbound connections, WSPrint persistence, and confirmed C2 contact indicators.

options.search: search index=threat_gen ((sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" EventID=3 *cmd.exe*) OR (sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" WSPrint) OR ((sourcetype=stream:http OR sourcetype=stream:dns) (185.196.10.247 OR 185.196.10.38 OR 212.11.64.105 OR bloopencil.net OR xcit76.com OR xtibh.com OR slack-msgs.com))) earliest=-24h latest=now

kpi_workstations.title: Compromised workstations (24h)
kpi_workstations.description: Distinct endpoints with cmd.exe outbound network activity or WSPrint persistence.

options.search: search index=threat_gen sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" | spath | search (EventID=3 EventData.Image="*\\cmd.exe") OR WSPrint earliest=-24h latest=now

kpi_ext_ips.title: External attacker IPs (24h)
kpi_ext_ips.description: Distinct IPs in 185.196.10.0/24, 212.11.64.105, plus external brute-force sources.

options.search: search index=threat_gen (src_ip=212.11.64.105 OR cidrmatch("185.196.10.0/24", src_ip) OR cidrmatch("185.196.10.0/24", dest_ip)) OR ((sourcetype=linux_secure ("Failed password" OR "Invalid user")) OR (sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4625)) earliest=-24h latest=now

kpi_c2_dns.title: C2 domain queries (24h)
kpi_c2_dns.description: DNS lookups for slack-msgs.com, bloopencil.net, xcit76.com, and xtibh.com.

options.search: search index=threat_gen sourcetype=stream:dns ("slack-msgs.com" OR "bloopencil.net" OR "xcit76.com" OR "xtibh.com") earliest=-24h latest=now

kpi_failed.title: Failed logon attempts (24h)
kpi_failed.description: Linux failed password / invalid user plus Windows Security 4625 events.

options.search: search (index=threat_gen sourcetype=linux_secure ("Failed password" OR "Invalid user")) OR (index=threat_gen sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4625) earliest=-24h latest=now

options.markdown:
## Endpoint compromise
**Persistence** (WSPrint) and **lateral movement** (cmd.exe outbound) on workstations.

line_wsprint.title: WSPrint.exe persistence by workstation (30d)
line_wsprint.description: Sysmon events referencing WSPrint — indicates scheduled-task persistence on compromised endpoints.

options.search: search index=threat_gen sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" "WSPrint" | spath earliest=-24h latest=now | search Computer=$row.Computer.value|s$

bar_cmd_outbound.title: cmd.exe outbound connections by workstation and user (7d)
bar_cmd_outbound.description: Sysmon Event ID 3 network connections initiated by cmd.exe — top 25 host/user pairs.

options.search: search index=threat_gen sourcetype="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" | spath | search EventID=3 EventData.Image="*\\cmd.exe" earliest=-24h latest=now | rename Computer as host | search host=$row.host.value|s$

options.markdown:
## Network / C2
**Attacker infrastructure** contacts and **suspicious DNS** query volume over the campaign timeline.

tbl_c2_contacts.title: C2 contacts with attacker infrastructure (30d)
tbl_c2_contacts.description: HTTP and DNS traffic to known campaign IPs and domains. Click a row to pivot into Search.

options.search: search index=threat_gen (sourcetype=stream:http OR sourcetype=stream:dns) earliest=-24h latest=now | search src_ip=$row.src_ip.value|s$ dest_ip=$row.dest_ip.value|s$

line_dns_trend.title: Suspicious DNS query volume (30d)
line_dns_trend.description: Daily DNS lookups for campaign C2 domains — slack-msgs.com, bloopencil.net, xcit76.com, xtibh.com.

options.search: search index=threat_gen sourcetype=stream:dns ("slack-msgs.com" OR "bloopencil.net" OR "xcit76.com" OR "xtibh.com") earliest=-24h latest=now

options.markdown:
## Identity / brute force
**External authentication attacks** and **successful external RDP** (Logon Type 10) by target workstation.

tbl_failed_logins.title: Top failed-login source IPs (24h)
tbl_failed_logins.description: Combined Linux sshd and Windows 4625 failures grouped by source IP.

options.search: search (index=threat_gen sourcetype=linux_secure ("Failed password" OR "Invalid user")) OR (index=threat_gen sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4625) earliest=-24h latest=now | search src_ip=$row.src_ip.value|s$

line_rdp_external.title: External RDP success (Logon Type 10) by target (7d)
line_rdp_external.description: Windows 4624 successful remote interactive logons from non-RFC1918 source addresses.

options.search: search index=threat_gen sourcetype="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4624 earliest=-24h latest=now | rex field=Message "Logon Type:\s+(?<logon_type>\d+)" | search logon_type=10 | search ComputerName=$row.ComputerName.value|s$
